name: voice-lab
description: Local-first VoxCPM2 voice cloning app for long-form narration and mastered MP3 export.

scripts.check: npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.clean: rm -rf .next .vercel .venv tsconfig.tsbuildinfo output storage .voice-lab runs voice-references debug-artifacts tmp hf-home hf-cache .hf-home .hf-cache model-cache models && find . -name .DS_Store -type f -delete && find . -type d -name __pycache__ -prune -exec rm -rf {} +
